cards.f1: Solar tailwind: advance to the Star Port. Collect as you pass.
cards.f2: Priority diplomatic route: advance to the Centaura Imperial Capital.
cards.f3: Customs reroutes you to the nearest hyperspace station. If owned, pay double.
cards.f4: Systems failure: you're towed to the nearest utility.
cards.f5: Shortcut through the Crimson Nebula: go to the Crimson Veil. Collect if you pass the Star Port.
cards.f6: Trade routes open: go to Mount Olympus. Collect as you pass.
cards.f8: A wormhole swallows you: go to the Black Hole. Do not collect.
cards.f9: Quantum safe-conduct: keep this card to escape the Black Hole.
cards.f10: Dividend from your mining shares. Collect 150 credits.
cards.f12: Fleet overhaul: pay 25 per dome and 100 per city.
cards.f15: Board the hyperspace jump: go to Orion Hyperspace Station. Collect if you pass the Star Port.
cards.f16: Named Fleet Admiral: each player pays you 25 credits.
cards.b1: A tidy deal: go to the Star Port and collect.
cards.b2: Inheritance from a colonist relative. Collect 200 credits.
cards.b3: You sell a cargo of rare minerals. Collect 100 credits.
cards.b5: Refund for a faulty ship. Collect 25 credits.
cards.b8: Tip from a grateful robot. Collect 20 credits.
cards.b9: You find loose credits floating in zero-g. Collect 10.
cards.b11: Caught with contraband cargo. Straight to the Black Hole.
cards.b12: Smuggler's pass: keep this card to escape the Black Hole.
cards.b13: Your colony's anniversary: each player gives you 10 credits.
cards.b15: Safety inspection: pay 40 per dome and 115 per city.
cards.b16: Good close on the mineral market. Collect 100 credits.

game.passed_through_go: {{player}} crosses the Star Port and collects {{amount}} credits
game.passed_through_go_self: You cross the Star Port and collect {{amount}} credits
game.send_to_holding: {{player}} is pulled into the Black Hole
game.send_to_holding_self: You are pulled into the Black Hole

rules.passStartBonus: Salary for crossing the Star Port
rules.doubleOnExactStart: Double salary if you land exactly on the Star Port
rules.finesToCenterPot: Fines go to the Orbital Shipyard pot
rules.noBuildBeforeFirstLap: No building before the first orbit
rules.holdingReleaseCost: Cost to escape the Black Hole
rules.maxHoldingTurns: Max orbits in the Black Hole
rules.collectRentWhileHeld: Collect rent while in the Black Hole
